title: From Chatbot to Digital Colleague: The Paradigm Shift Toward Persistent Autonomous AI
summary: From Chatbot to Digital Colleague: The Paradigm Shift Toward Persistent Autonomous AI
whyItMatters: Large Language Models (LLMs) are undergoing a fundamental transformation from conversational generators into integrated AI systems capable of reasoning, action, memory, and self-improvement. We conceptualize this transition as a shift from Chatbot to Digital Colleague: from conversational answers to persistent work. We organize this transition along two tig…
